runtime.bodyPreview:
DUAL-TRACK GROWTH PROGRAM
You grow two tracks side by side. When both grow, you earn.
A simple rewards program that pays for consistent recruiting and balanced team growth — not just inviting fast on one side.
What is the Dual-Track Program?
Your referral network is split into two independent tracks: Track A and Track B. Every person you invite joins one of the two.
The system rewards you based on the smaller of the two tracks each month. This encourages you to keep both tracks active and growing, instead of stacking everyone on one side.
Picture it like this
A simple snapshot of your network — you at the top, your two tracks branching out below.
Track A
$3,000/mo
Track B
$2,000/mo
How your team grows (3 steps)
1
You invite someone
When you invite your first friend, you choose whether to p

1
You invite someone
When you invite your first friend, you choose whether to place them in Track A or Track B. That's t

They invite others
Whoever your friend invites is automatically added to the same track. The track grows downward like

3
Auto-placement assistance
When your network partner's direct slots fill up, new members they invite are auto-placed in
Both tracks need at least $1,000/month to qualify

runtime.bodyPreview:
ALL 6 COMMISSION TYPES
Six different ways money lands in your wallet.
Your account collects from up to six different reward streams — each triggered by something different. Here's what each one means.
Why six?
Every time you see a deposit, it came from one of six channels. Some are tied to your direct invites, some to extended-network activity, some to your V rank, some to special programs. Mixing them is what lets your earnings stack — but you'll want to know which is which so you can plan.
The six channels at a glance
Tap any commission in your list to see which channel it came from. Each has its own color and icon.
👥
Network royalty · Direct + Extended
Paid when anyone in your influence network places a qualifying order. Direct invites pay your current rate; the extended network pays v

controls.text: The six channels at a glance

COOLING
Just credited. 30-day verification window — protects against fraud and refunds. Can't be withdrawn yet, but visi

UNLOCKED
30 days have passed cleanly. The commission is fully earned and available for withdrawal.

WITHDRAWN
You've moved it out to your wallet. Recorded for tax and reporting.

runtime.bodyPreview:
GLOBAL LEADERSHIP POOL
5% of all platform volume, split among V3+ leaders every week.
The Leadership Pool is the platform's way of sharing growth with the leaders who actually build teams. Earn votes by climbing V ranks; collect dividends every Monday.
What is the Leadership Pool?
Every week, the platform takes 5% of total transaction volume across Nexion and puts it into a shared pool. That pool is then distributed among all users at V rank 3 (Captain) or above, in proportion to each leader's vote weight.
Think of it like a profit-sharing program. The more the platform grows, the bigger the weekly pool — and the more votes you hold (by climbing V ranks), the larger your slice.
How votes scale with V rank
Vote weight doubles every rank from V3 onward. Higher ranks get exponentially larger

controls.text: How votes scale with V rank

1
Monday 00:00 UTC · Pool starts
The new weekly pool begins accumulating. The previous week's pool is settled and distri

2
All week · 5% of volume flows in
Every device order, every Cloud Share top-up, every re-invest contributes 5% to the p

3
Sunday 23:59 UTC · Snapshot taken
Your vote weight is snapshot at end of week. Distribution happens automatically Mond
How to grow your pool share
Got it · see this week's pool

runtime.bodyPreview:
RANK PROGRESSION SYSTEM
Climb the ranks. Unlock bigger rewards every step.
Every rank you reach permanently unlocks new earning channels, deeper team rewards, and exclusive physical prizes.
What is the Rank System?
Your account starts at V0 Cadet. As you invest in devices, invite friends, and grow your team, you advance through 13 ranks all the way up to V12 Singularity.
Each higher rank permanently expands what you earn from the network — wider extended royalty reach, a slice of the global leadership pool, and a tangible prize you can keep.
13 ranks at a glance
From Cadet to Singularity. Each step has its own requirements and rewards.

runtime.bodyPreview:
ROYALTY PROGRAM
Earn royalty on every order in your influence network.
Two royalty components plus a four-tier Partner Status that grows with your monthly network activity and unlocks perks. Your royalty rate stays a flat 10%.
What is Influence Network Royalty?
Two components combine into your monthly royalty. Direct Royalty pays a percentage of every order placed by friends you invited. Network Yield Bonus is an algorithmic monthly bonus calculated from your extended network's compute activity.
Royalty is paid forever from every order in your influence network (device purchase / recharge / upgrade). Comparable industry programs: Amazon Associates, Stripe Partners, Crypto.com Affiliate, YouTube AdSense referral.
Partner Status Tiers
Your Partner Status grows with your monthly network activ

controls.text:
Status
Monthly network activity
Perk unlocked
Network Yield Bonus — how it's calculated

A
Network activity
Total monthly compute volume across your extended network. More active devices = bigger bonus pool.

B
Influence Score
A 1.0–5.0 score reflecting your network's depth and consistency. Grows logarithmically with network ac
How to grow your royalty (3 levers)

1
Invite more direct friends
Each direct friend's orders pay your flat 10% royalty rate, forever. More direct friends =

2
Help direct friends activate their devices
When your direct friends invite their own friends and that extended network

3
Climb to the next Partner Status
Reaching $5K monthly activity moves you from Standard to Verified status. $50K reache
